title: Concatenate link with a field on board?
excerpt: I have a need to create a new column on all our boards that contain a link with a unique identifier at the end of it. I have a field in each board with the unique identifier and I just need to create a field that takes t…

posts.author: bartleby (Justin Atkinson)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a need to create a new column on all our boards that contain a link with a unique identifier at the end of it. I have a field in each board with the unique identifier and I just need to create a field that takes that ID and attaches it to the end of a static url. I am attempting to concatenate in a formula, but I’m getting an “illegal formula” error. Is there a way to accomplish this without needing to use the API to create all of these urls?

posts.author: DanIngham-IOI (Dan Ingham IOI / BPX)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Justin
Hopefully this should give you what you need
Column A replace for your static IP coloumn, Column B replace for the Unique Code ID column

CONCATENATE({Column A},“/”,{Column B)})

Please let me know if this worked for you and if you need any additional help
Many thanks Dan
